title: Gently Spiced Syrian Lamb Kebabs
description: A fresh and energizing Syrian dish featuring shredded lamb, coconut cream, and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients, perfect for a spring evening.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded lamb, chopped onion, minced garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
In a small bowl, whisk together the coconut cream and egg until well combined.
Add the coconut cream mixture to the lamb mixture and stir until the lamb is evenly coated.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked through.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
